title: Uptown Girl
meaning_summary: Its bright hook and cross-generational pop familiarity make it commercially durable well beyond its chart life.
revenue_drivers: Pop-oldies and nostalgia playlists support repeat streaming.
Broad familiarity keeps the song active in catalog rediscovery.
Event and media reuse can lift earnings beyond baseline streams.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Uptown Girl is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
